instructions.summary: Send one email to Worktugal for a partnership / backlink — takes 2 minutes
instructions.detail: Worktugal ranks for exactly the keywords our customers search (portal das financas english, recibo verde guide, D8 visa taxes). A single backlink from them is worth ~50 random backlinks. Agent tried to send via Resend but Resend blocks sending to non-owner addresses without domain verification. Send from your personal email instead.
instructions.exact_action:
Open your email client and send the following:

To: hello@worktugal.com
Subject: Partnership idea -- VerdeDesk + Worktugal content collaboration

Body:
---
Hi Worktugal team,

I came across your guides on Portuguese freelancer taxes -- really the best English-language resource on the topic.

I have been building VerdeDesk (verdedesk.vercel.app) -- an English interface for the recibo verde workflow, with VAT threshold tracking and compliance reminders. It is designed for exactly the people your guides attract: D8 visa holders and expat freelancers navigating Portal das Financas.

A few ideas for collaboration:
1. Referral mention -- if you are open to it, a mention in your tax guides pointing readers toward VerdeDesk as a tool for the workflow you describe
2. Co-authored content -- I could contribute a detailed walkthrough of the recibo verde process that you could publish on Worktugal, with mutual attribution
3. Resource listing -- if you have a tools/resources section, happy to be included

No obligation and no rush -- just thought it was worth a conversation given the obvious overlap.

Happy to jump on a call or keep it async.

Best,
Carlos
VerdeDesk
---
instructions.unblocks: Worktugal backlink -- highest-leverage SEO action available at this stage
